topic: The real reason Rick's training simulation broke Morty's mind
hook: When Rick tried to teach Morty advanced interdimensional engineering, he accidentally trapped him in a literal 'Tutorial Hell' time loop.
answer_angle: Rick's theoretical, step-by-step simulations strip away Morty's ability to adapt, proving that the only way Morty actually survives the multiverse is through messy, hands-on project building and practical implementation rather than endless guided lessons.
